creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 247179
Patch for openvsp

Compiles fine without this patch and breaks builds when CMake files for libxml2 are available.

Compile tested on 14.0-RELEASE (amd64), with PR 273210 applied

Without PR 273210 applied
Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)
